name: Code snippet
when_to_use: 需要在 AI 回答里交付一段带文件名、语言标识、语法着色和本地复制按钮的代码时用它：适合配置片段、API 示例和修复补丁的关键代码。需要编辑或运行代码时应使用编辑器/沙箱；需要自动识别大量独立代码块时可直接用 highlight-js 条目。
why_valuable: 裸 pre/code 缺少文件上下文、复制反馈和跨主题着色，AI 手写正则高亮又不可靠；本模板即时渲染安全转义的代码，再在自有 shadow 内用 highlight.js tokenizer 增强，网络或 CSP 阻断时仍保留完整可读代码。

en.when_to_use: Use it when an AI response needs to deliver a code fragment with a filename, language label, syntax coloring, and local copy button. It suits configuration snippets, API examples, and the key code from a fix. For editing or running code, use an editor or sandbox instead; to auto-detect many independent code blocks, use the highlight-js entry directly.
en.why_valuable: Bare pre/code lacks file context, copy feedback, and cross-theme coloring, while AI-written regex highlighting is unreliable. This template immediately renders safely escaped code, then enhances it with the highlight.js tokenizer inside its own shadow. If the network or CSP blocks the module, the complete readable code remains.

data_in.note: data.code is the complete code string; filename and language drive the header and highlighting. language should be a highlight.js language id such as javascript, python, or json. When omitted, the code is shown as plaintext and highlightAuto attempts detection. caption is a read-only description. The highlighting module loads asynchronously from a fixed jsDelivr /+esm URL; on failure, the textContent fallback remains. copy accesses only the local clipboard and is not an uplink.

schema.code: string - complete code to display and copy; always rendered safely through textContent first
schema.filename?: string - toolbar filename; displays "snippet.txt" when omitted
schema.language?: string - highlight.js language id, such as 'javascript', 'python', or 'json'; when omitted, use the plaintext/auto-detection fallback
schema.caption?: string - one-line read-only description below the code

spec.note: The code area grows with its content, then scrolls in both directions above 520px. The filename truncates, and the language pill is hidden below 520px. No vh or percentage heights.

data_in.note: data.code 是完整代码字符串；filename 与 language 用于头部和高亮。language 应使用 highlight.js 语言 id（如 javascript、python、json），省略时按 plaintext 展示并让 highlightAuto 尝试识别。caption 是只读说明。高亮模块从固定 jsDelivr /+esm URL 异步加载；失败时保留 textContent 回退。copy 只操作本地剪贴板，不构成 uplink。

schema.code: string —— 要显示和复制的完整代码；始终先以 textContent 安全渲染
schema.filename?: string —— 工具栏文件名；省略时显示 “snippet.txt”
schema.language?: string —— highlight.js 语言 id，例如 'javascript'、'python'、'json'；省略时使用 plaintext/自动识别回退
schema.caption?: string —— 代码下方的一行只读说明

spec.note: 代码区随内容增高，最高 520px 后内部双向滚动；文件名截断，520px 以下隐藏语言胶囊。无 vh/百分比高度。

example._why: 示例是可直接识别的 JavaScript fetch helper，包含文件名、语言、注释、字符串、异常处理和说明，可验证实际语法着色与复制按钮。

minimal.caption: Retries transient failures once and preserves the response status.

uplink: display-only：复制按钮只把既有代码写入本地剪贴板，不改变数据、不提交内容，也不向 AI 上行。

carriers.artifact: supported:boot.artifact 已在 sandboxed iframe 中以 example.minimal 原样渲染验证；CSS 与 DOM 全部位于自有 shadow root
carriers.widget: supported:与 artifact 同一模板，仅 parent 改为 shadowRoot；可在载体 shadow 内再挂自有 shadow
carriers.codex: supported:与已验证的 artifact boot 相同，document.getElementById('viz') 为唯一载体挂载点

isolation.evidence: self-authored inline-template, owns its shadow, zero global footprint; rendered-verified; one local copy-button listener; highlight.js +esm tokenizer writes only escaped spans into the owned code node
